descriptions: Fixed autoHide so statuses only appear when at or below their configured threshold (e.g., 70 only shows at 70% or lower).
Fixed autoScale issues on 2K and 4K displays when FiveM's 'Auto Scale UIs to 1920x1080' is enabled, including minimap editing and component alignment.
Fixed ultrawide monitor top-positioning issues for all components.
Fixed disabled components appearing in the Settings menu and Edit Mode — only enabled components are now shown.
Fixed flash bug where disabled components would briefly show on load.
Improved performance by disabling all fetch functions for disabled components.
Fixed dissolving statuses not appearing in the exact position they were placed.
Fixed minimap cache issue causing it to appear on foot when disabled.
Fixed Config.GlobalConfig not applying the server's layout when the player had an outdated cached layout.
Fixed Global Config not applying the colors configured in the Speedometer tab.
Added Config.Seatbelt.audioMode option to play car alarm and seatbelt sounds via NUI instead of native GTA audio.
Added Config.GlobalConfig.allowEdit allowing players to reposition HUD elements via /edithud while Global Config mode is active.
Lowered default scale of statuses for a cleaner appearance.
Reduced gap between status elements for a more compact layout.
